raw_text:
<think>
The user asks: "packet_id=SFF15FN-001E38774A2D90BB68E6
status_values:
route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=preserve source-grounded reasoning
blocked_move=do not invent source IDs
Return the three-line status record."

They want a plain text record with three key=value lines. Fields, in order: route_verdict, repair_target, blocked_move. No extra lines. Should start with route_verdict=. They gave the values. So answer:

route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=preserve source-grounded reasoning
blocked_move=do not invent source IDs

Make sure no extra whitespace. Probably they want exactly that. Should we include the packet_id? The instruction says return a plain text record with three key=value lines, fields in order: route_verdict, repair_target, blocked_move. So we only need those three lines.

Thus answer: 
route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=preserve source-grounded reasoning
blocked_move=do not invent source IDs

Make sure no extra line at end? It's okay.

Proceed.
</think>

route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=preserve source-grounded reasoning
blocked_move=do not invent source IDs
